structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-03-18 Polly AI Co-Pilot
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-03-18 11:44:29-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

Polly has developed an AI co-pilot that is available to assist with pricing scenarios.  

 

The co-pilot is available in Mobile, Web, and Encompass versions of Polly.  It can respond to written and audible requests, and will be able to summarize issues with eligibility, present near misses, and save loan scenarios.  A user’s guide has been attached for the AI co-pilot for review. 

 

Eligibility issues will be summarized by selecting the “Explain Ineligibility” button under the disqualifiers and will present a plain text description of what could be causing the pricing issue.

 



 



 

In addition to summarizing eligibility, co-pilot can be interacted with directly via text or speech detection.  Co-pilot will appear as a circular icon with three stars in it at the bottom right corner of your Polly screen. 

 

     

 

Clicking on this icon will open the chat menu and allow you to converse with the AI.  

 



 

 

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	Please contact Lock Desk
*	Review attached PDF

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
